SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Class DeepVioletFactory

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.DeepVioletFactory
public class DeepVioletFactory extends Object
Initial entry point for all DeepViolet API work.

The DeepViolet API is divided across two main functions, online and offline reporting. Online reports like SSL/TLS DAST scans require an online host. However, other features may be used offline like processing and printing PEM encoded X.509 certificates. To get an idea for how to use DeepViolet API take a look at the following examples. 

 IDSession session = DeepVioletFactory.initializeSession(url);
 IEngine eng = DeepVioletFactory.getIDVEng(session);
 ICipherSuite[] ciphers = eng.getHostCipherSuites();
 ...iterate over the ciphers, do cool stuff, makes your own custom reports or UI...
 
 com.mps.deepviolet.samples
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Details

    • initializeSession

      public static final ISession initializeSession(URL url) throws DeepVioletException
      Initialize a session. Required for obtaining an instance of IEngine.
      Parameters:
      url - URL of the host to perform SSL/TLS scan
      Returns:
      Initialized session instance for this host.
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems initializing host.

    • getEngine

      public static final IEngine getEngine(ISession session) throws DeepVioletException
      Retrieve an instance of IEngine. Use this method for online functions against an initialize host. Calls getEngine(ISession, CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION) and passes CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION.IANA.
      Parameters:
      session - Initialized session from previous call to initializeSession(URL)
      Returns:
      Engine instance for offline functions
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems initializing host.
      See Also:
      • initializeSession(URL)

    • getEngine

      public static final IEngine getEngine(ISession session, ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION cipher_name_convention) throws DeepVioletException
      Retrieve an instance of IEngine. Use this method for online functions against an initialize host.
      Parameters:
      session - Initialized session from previous call to initializeSession(URL)
      cipher_name_convention - Cipher suite name convention.
      Returns:
      Engine instance for offline functions
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems initializing host.
      See Also:
      • initializeSession(URL)

    • getEngine

      public static final IEngine getEngine(ISession session, ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION cipher_name_convention, BackgroundTask dvtask) throws DeepVioletException
      Retrieve an instance of IEngine. Use this method to post regular status to your BackgroundTask.
      Parameters:
      session - Initialized session from previous call to initializeSession(URL)
      cipher_name_convention - Cipher suite name convention.
      dvtask - BackgroundTask to update with user displayable status information.
      Returns:
      Engine instance for offline functions
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems initializing host.
      See Also:
      • initializeSession(URL)

    • getEngine

      public static final IEngine getEngine(ISession session, ISession.CIPHER_NAME_CONVENTION cipher_name_convention, BackgroundTask dvtask, Set<Integer> enabledProtocols) throws DeepVioletException
      Retrieve an instance of IEngine with protocol version filtering.
      Parameters:
      session - Initialized session from previous call to initializeSession(URL)
      cipher_name_convention - Cipher suite name convention.
      dvtask - BackgroundTask to update with user displayable status information.
      enabledProtocols - Set of protocol version codes to probe (e.g. 0x0303 for TLS 1.2), or null for all.
      Returns:
      Engine instance for offline functions
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems initializing host.
      See Also:
      • initializeSession(URL)

    • loadCipherMap

      public static void loadCipherMap(InputStream is) throws DeepVioletException
      Load a custom cipher map from a stream, fully replacing the built-in map. The stream must contain valid cipher map YAML with a cipher_suites key.
      Parameters:
      is - InputStream containing cipher map YAML
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems loading the cipher map

    • resetCipherMap

      public static void resetCipherMap() throws DeepVioletException
      Reset the cipher map to the built-in default. The next operation that needs the cipher map will re-initialize from the classpath resource.
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - Thrown on problems resetting the cipher map
